description: Invoice statement round-1 validation set for header blocks, totals, and table structure.

items.notes: Single invoice statement image. Primary sample for tableDetected, rowCount, and firstRowPreview.
Standard single-page invoice statement. Primary sample for two header blocks, totals, and item table structure.
Blue invoice statement form. Support sample for left/right header blocks and lower amount structure.
Two-page invoice statement. Round 1 is page-1 structure checking only. OCR quality significantly degraded: party blocks garbled, addresses garbled.
Long multi-page detail PDF. Deferred from round-1 complete extraction.
거래명세서 세부 내역 (수량/Lot No 중심). 공급자 정보 없음(선택 필드). 금액 합계 없음. supplier fields GT 미포함.
거래명세서 (수량/serial 중심). supplier address tail (302호/당산동4가/SK V1 센터)이 OCR 원문에 없어 partial match 유지. 금액 합계 없는 수량 중심 문서.
